name_en: 3D real photos. Classic 'Pillow' style from an exclusive original factory channel. A style that will definitely last for a long time and never go out of style. The workmanship and quality are the same as in the store. The size is very practical. It is consistently out of stock officially. If you want to save money and have high quality requirements, don't miss it.
